rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §37.106 governs school district vehicle identification insignia and parking privileges—unrelated subject matter with no overlap.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may provide for the issuance and use of suitable vehicle identification insignia.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and vehicle identification insignia statute.
